ab: Sayun cyan su maki muyax?
en: Sayun are you home?

ab: uya, uwah cka.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Yabung, cyan su maki muyax?
en: Yabung, are you home?

ab: ini kaki muyax Yabung ay! kingan ga Ipay, maki yaw ga? mwah ga kyalaw mu Yabung.
ch: B:Yabung不在家耶！我是Ipay，有什麼事嗎？回來我會轉告Yabung。
en: Yabung is not at home. I am Ipay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: cimu ga ima lalu?
en: Who are you?

ab: Yaki, cami ga yaway ki yayut, gwahi blihun ha.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是yaway和yayut，幫我們開門。
en: Grandma, we are yaway and yayut, please open the door for us.

ab: ima a?
en: Who is it?

ab: kingan ga Toli, nyan cu mwah khangi Yukan.
en: I am Toli, I am here for Yukan.

ab: Yaki nyan cu mwah mkan mlaw isu la.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: bsyaq su ini uwah la, krmatun misu calay.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Kumu, nyan cu mwah cisan isu la.
en: Kumu, I am here to play with you.

ab: nahay uwah cka, bsyaq misu mna la.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: nuya mu ngahi qani, tlami maniq.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看。
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: lbing niqun ngahi qani.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: uwah! qani ga pinnuya mu bway khoniq, tlami maniq.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: lbing bway khoniq qani.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: tama! qani ga nuya mu qcyay tlami maniq!
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: u! lbing calay niqun qcyay qani.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: qaniq su unak ga?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: iyat cu kaniq unak, kaniq cu ringo hiya.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: kaniq su pinkan ga?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: uya, siyan mu maniq.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: taqay mu bway khoniq pniqay misu.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: mhuway su, piyux boq bway khoniq qani.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: mala cu qsya pbuxay misu.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: mhuway su.
en: Thank you.

ab: klokah maniq, piyux hnapuy mu rramat.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: u! shiya calay niqun.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: klokah maniq, piyux ramat nyan na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: han, mhuway su.
en: Okay, thank you.

ab: klokah maniq, piyux ramat nyan na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: piyux wan mu niqun la, iyat cu kaniq la.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
